# Orbis

> Orbis is the AI relationship workspace and AI CRM for founders and GTM teams. Powered by OpenClaw, an open-source AI agent framework. 1,000+ integrations and skills, multi-channel AI across Gmail, WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, and more.

Orbis helps founders manage relationships across every channel with AI that understands context, enriches contacts, and generates hyper-personalized outreach. Unlike traditional CRMs that demand data entry, Orbis fills itself in.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://meetorbis.com/): AI relationship workspace for founders — network intelligence, contact enrichment, and personalized outreach
- [About](https://meetorbis.com/about): Founder story, company mission, and why Orbis exists
- [Blog](https://meetorbis.com/blog): Insights on AI, relationships, networking, and the future of CRM

## Features

- [Inbox](https://meetorbis.com/inbox): AI-powered email triage with relationship context, multi-account Gmail, and AI replies
- [Workspace](https://meetorbis.com/workspace): Shared AI conversations, notes, and tasks linked to people and companies
- [People](https://meetorbis.com/people): AI people search, auto-enrichment, sentiment tracking, and introduction mapping
- [Campaigns](https://meetorbis.com/campaigns): Personalized outreach built from real relationship history across channels
- [Data Model](https://meetorbis.com/data): Custom objects, 20+ attribute types, templates, and AI-powered search

## Platform

- [Chrome Extension](https://meetorbis.com/extension): Free Chrome extension that shows company intelligence (funding, people, financials, hiring, news) on any website. Extract contacts from Luma events and Instagram. Enrich person profiles instantly.
- [Integrations](https://meetorbis.com/integrations): 1,000+ integrations powered by OpenClaw — Gmail, Slack, HubSpot, Salesforce, and more
- [Skills](https://meetorbis.com/skills): Domain-specific AI skills — fundraising, sales, hiring, engineering, customer success, and more

## Documentation

- [Orbis Docs](https://docs.meetorbis.com): Full product documentation — setup guides, feature docs, integrations, AI agents, and workspace management

## Resources & Tools

- [Company Lookup](https://meetorbis.com/resources/company-lookup): Free company data lookup by domain. Returns funding, team, hiring signals, SEC filings, news, social footprint, and more in a single profile. Shareable via /resources/company-lookup/{domain}.
- [Outbound Cost Calculator](https://meetorbis.com/resources/outbound-calculator): Free tool to model the true cost of cold email, LinkedIn, and phone outbound. Includes live DNS deliverability check, funnel math, cost breakdown, and personalized Intelligence Brief email.
- [Email Deliverability Check](https://meetorbis.com/resources/email-deliverability): Free SPF, DKIM, and DMARC checker with fix-it guidance. Check if your emails are landing in inboxes or spam.
- [S&P 500 Companies](https://meetorbis.com/resources/sp-500): Browse 500 largest US-listed companies with enriched profiles
- [FTSE 100 Companies](https://meetorbis.com/resources/ftse-100): Browse UK's largest public companies with enriched profiles
- [Top Investors](https://meetorbis.com/resources/top-investors): Leading VCs and angel investors
- [Pre-Seed Investors](https://meetorbis.com/resources/pre-seed-investors): Firms investing at pre-seed stage

## Blog Posts

- [The Orbis Manifesto](https://meetorbis.com/blog/orbis-manifesto): Why we're building Orbis and our vision for AI-native relationship management
- [The Future of AI CRM](https://meetorbis.com/blog/ai-crm-future): How AI is reshaping CRM for founders
- [How We Passed Google CASA Tier 2 with Claude](https://meetorbis.com/blog/how-we-passed-google-casa-tier-2-with-claude): Security compliance journey with AI assistance
- [Hyper-Personalization](https://meetorbis.com/blog/hyper-personalization): AI-powered personalization in outreach
- [Founder Networking Mistakes](https://meetorbis.com/blog/founder-networking-mistakes): Common networking pitfalls and how to avoid them
- [ChatGPT and CRM](https://meetorbis.com/blog/chatgpt): Using AI assistants for relationship management

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://meetorbis.com/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap with all 1,000+ pages
- [Privacy Policy](https://meetorbis.com/privacy): Privacy and data handling
